findings.message: Mapped all 62 required Stage 1 audio filenames to candidate source WAV files from Gamemaster Audio - Pro Sound Collection.
The selected sources are WAV files, while design target filenames remain OGG. Actual target replacement requires a later approved conversion or target-format decision.
Unity MCP tools were not callable, so Unity import validation was not performed.
No gameplay scripts, scenes, prefabs, ScriptableObjects, or existing audio placeholders were modified in this unit.

blocked_reason: Unity-native import checks and OGG conversion/replacement were out of scope for stage1_audio_selection_manifest.
